title: Over $500m in fresh funding, risks of “French state influence” and a 100x valuation: What Pasqal’s SPAC filings reveal
summary:
Pasqal, the Paris-based scaleup building quantum computers, has published a host of documents providing detailed insights into the company’s financials as it prepares to float on the New York-based Nasdaq stock exchange later this year.

Daphné Leprince-Ringuet is a senior reporter for Sifted, based...

multimedia.alt: Over $500m in fresh funding, risks of “French state influence” and a 100x valuation: What Pasqal’s SPAC filings reveal

fullArticle:
Pasqal, the Paris-based scaleup building quantum computers, has published a host of documents providing detailed insights into the company’s financials as it prepares to float on the New York-based Nasdaq stock exchange later this year.

Daphné Leprince-Ringuet is a senior reporter for Sifted, based in Paris. She covers French tech and writes Sifted's  AI and Deeptech newsletter . You can find her on X and LinkedIn
